name: com.likeon.gas
description: Sigil — a GAS-style ability-system framework for Unity. A GameplayTag-driven state bus connects abilities, attributes, effects, input dispatch, and presentation (GameplayCue, camera blend stack, surface effects). Melee/ranged combat and movement live in optional companion packages (com.likeon.gas.combat, com.likeon.gas.movement). Independent Unity implementation; single-player authoritative logic.
